Components / Thinking Dots

Preview theme

Thinking Dots

A lightweight 3×3 dot-grid loading indicator for agent thinking states. A single virtual gravity point travels through the grid on a pattern-defined path. Lines arc as quadratic Bézier curves pulled toward the gravity point, then relax back to straight as it moves away. Dots brighten and sweep through a spatial rainbow — colour determined by the angle from the gravity point to each dot — creating concentric colour rings that travel with the gravity point. Designed to sit inline with text or float independently.

Animation Patterns

Each pattern defines the path of the virtual gravity point across the grid. breathe traces a rectangle perimeter (TL→TR→BR→BL); breathe-x traces X-shaped diagonals (TL→BR→TR→BL). Both alternate push and pull on consecutive laps — the grid expands outward on the first half of each cycle, then contracts inward on the second.

pattern="diagonal"
Loading
pattern="radial"
Loading
pattern="radial-pull"
Loading
pattern="horizontal"
Loading
pattern="random"
Loading
pattern="breathe"
Loading
pattern="breathe-x"
Loading

Colour Sweep

Colour is determined spatially by the angle from the gravity point to each dot, creating concentric rainbow rings that rotate and travel with the gravity point. Dots are grey at rest; rainbow colour sweeps through each dot as the gravity point approaches, then fades back to grey as it recedes.

pattern="diagonal" · size="lg"
Loading
pattern="radial" · size="lg"
Loading
pattern="radial-pull" · size="lg"
Loading
pattern="horizontal" · size="lg"
Loading
pattern="random" · size="lg"
Loading
pattern="breathe" · size="lg"
Loading
pattern="breathe-x" · size="lg"
Loading

Line Bending

Lines animate as quadratic Bézier curves whose control points are displaced toward the moving gravity point. Displacement uses an inverse-distance pull with quadratic rim taper — lines near the gravity point arc strongly toward it, while distant lines stay straight. As the gravity point moves through the grid, it pulls the nearest lines into smooth curves that travel with it. Slower durations make the arcing motion more visible.

duration={3.0} — slow, visible gravity arc · size="lg"
Loading

Sizes

size="sm" (16px) · size="md" (20px) · size="lg" (24px)
LoadingLoadingLoading

Speed

duration=1.2 (fast) · duration=1.8 (default) · duration=3.0 (slow)
LoadingLoadingLoading

Surface

surface="default" · surface="shadow-border"
LoadingLoading

Inline Composition

Inline with text — sm · md · lg
LoadingAgent is thinking...LoadingAgent is thinking...LoadingAgent is thinking...

Static

disableMotion — grey dots, straight lines, no JS animation
LoadingLoadingLoading

Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
pattern"diagonal" | "radial" | "radial-pull" | "horizontal" | "random" | "breathe" | "breathe-x""diagonal"Wave animation pattern — controls the path of the travelling gravity point across the 3×3 grid. breathe = rectangle perimeter, push lap then pull lap. breathe-x = X-shaped diagonals, push lap then pull lap. radial-pull = full push orbit → rest → full pull orbit.
durationnumber2.6Animation cycle duration in seconds. Controls the speed of the gravity point travel.
size"sm" | "md" | "lg""md"Bounding box size: sm = 16px, md = 20px, lg = 24px.
surface"default" | "shadow-border""default"Adds a subtle shadow ring around the wrapper span.
disableMotionbooleanfalseRenders a static grid with no animation. Zero JS animation overhead.
classNamestring—Additional classes applied to the outer wrapper span.

Usage

tsx
import { ThinkingDots } from '@spaceship/design-system';

// Default — diagonal pattern, md size — gravity arcs diagonally, lines curve toward it
<ThinkingDots />

// Radial ripple, large
<ThinkingDots pattern="radial" size="lg" />

// Inline with text
<span className="flex items-center gap-2">
  <ThinkingDots size="sm" />
  <span className="text-(--text-secondary) [font-size:var(--font-size-sm)]">
    Agent is thinking...
  </span>
</span>

// Slow — gravity arc and spatial rainbow clearly visible
<ThinkingDots duration={3.0} size="lg" />

// Fast pulse (1.2 s cycle)
<ThinkingDots duration={1.2} />

// Shadow surface
<ThinkingDots surface="shadow-border" />

// Static — grey dots, straight lines, no animation
<ThinkingDots disableMotion />

Thinking Ship

A mini saucer icon for loading states. The ship weaves sinusoidally as it flies toward the upper-right, and asteroid streaks fall diagonally across the 20×20 viewBox. Two layered sine waves at different frequencies give an organic feel to the dodge motion. Same CVA size/surface API as ThinkingDots.

Sizes

size="sm" (16px) · size="md" (20px) · size="lg" (24px)
LoadingLoadingLoading

Surface

surface="default" · surface="shadow-border"
LoadingLoading

Static

disableMotion — ship at rest, no asteroid streaks
LoadingLoadingLoading
